ar.site.slogan: القلب كالقلم، على الورق ينزف دمًا
ar.update.title: الموقع الإلكتروني قيد إعادة الهيكلة

en_GB.home.hero.lead: Because you were willing to put your heart to it.
en_GB.home.frame.label: Always on purpose
en_GB.home.frame.copy: Still enough to build something, still keeping the lightning.
en_GB.home.principle.make.title: Take the work seriously.
en_GB.home.principle.make.body: A minute or a year, the time it takes does not make it any less yours. If it matters to you, it is worth carrying through.
en_GB.home.principle.share.title: Let it leave the room.
en_GB.home.principle.share.body: It's easy to create for yourself, but creation is meant to be shared and enjoyed by many, so if you made something you like, maybe someone else will like it too.
en_GB.home.principle.evolve.title: Let the vision change shape.
en_GB.home.principle.evolve.body: Sometimes your ideas inspire others to make something of their own. You might agree, disagree, like or dislike their creation, but remember that what you made inspired someone to make something new.
en_GB.home.snapshot.title: Latest Stuff
en_GB.home.snapshot.lead: This pulls the latest changes from ELECTRIS.
en_GB.home.snapshot.empty.title: The first signal lands here.
en_GB.home.snapshot.empty.body: Once coherent thought is formed, this card will start carrying the newest writing on the site.
en_GB.home.snapshot.devlog.label: Still Underway
en_GB.home.snapshot.devlog.title: Latest devlog
en_GB.home.snapshot.devlog.body: The will be news regarding the progress on our games.
en_GB.home.snapshot.music.label: Still Underway
en_GB.home.snapshot.music.title: Latest music
en_GB.home.snapshot.music.body: The will be news regarding music we produce and/or share.
en_GB.home.note.copy: The restructure is still underway, but we're really close to being done.
en_GB.site.slogan: Heart like a pen, On paper it bleeds
en_GB.update.title: WEBSITE UNDER RESTRUCTURE
